briefdescription.para: < Start of include guard for EVENT_TEMPLATE_H to prevent multiple inclusions.

detaileddescription.para: Definition of EVENT_TEMPLATE_H to indicate the header has been included. Includes the particle_template class for particle data handling. Includes the cproperty template for custom property management. Includes the element_t structure, a base data element type. Includes the event_t structure for event data representation. Includes the tools class for utility functions. Includes the meta class for metadata handling.

briefdescription.para: Defines the base template class for event data representation and manipulation.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains the declaration of the event_template class, which serves as the base template for processing physics event data. It provides functionality for managing trees, branches, and leaves in physics data structures, as well as properties like event weight and index. The class also supports dynamic particle registration and building events from raw data.
The event architecture is designed to be flexible and extensible, allowing customization for different types of physics analyses and data formats.

sect1.title: Usage
sect1.para: Subclass event_template to create custom event types:
